prompt: Create a CRM to track sales leads and agents log interactions.

business_rules: Only managers can mark deals as Deleted.
constraints: User accounts must use email login authentication.

assumptions.reason: Standard pipeline workflows start at prospect and end at won

confidence_explanation: Lack of clearly defined business operational rules.
